verses.3: LaAAallaka bakhiAAun nafsaka alla yakoonoo mumineena
verses.4: In nasha nunazzil AAalayhim mina alssamai ayatan fathallat aAAnaquhum laha khadiAAeena
verses.5: Wama yateehim min thikrin mina alrrahmani muhdathin illa kanoo AAanhu muAArideena
verses.6: Faqad kaththaboo fasayateehim anbao ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona
verses.7: Awalam yaraw ila alardi kam anbatna feeha min kulli zawjin kareemin
verses.8: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.10: Waith nada rabbuka moosa ani iti alqawma alththalimeena
verses.12: Qala rabbi innee akhafu an yukaththibooni
verses.13: Wayadeequ sadree wala yantaliqu lisanee faarsil ila haroona
verses.14: Walahum AAalayya thanbun faakhafu an yaqtulooni
verses.15: Qala kalla faithhaba biayatina inna maAAakum mustamiAAoona
verses.16: Fatiya firAAawna faqoola inna rasoolu rabbi alAAalameena
verses.18: Qala alam nurabbika feena waleedan walabithta feena min AAumurika sineena
verses.19: WafaAAalta faAAlataka allatee faAAalta waanta mina alkafireena
verses.20: Qala faAAaltuha ithan waana mina alddalleena
verses.21: Fafarartu minkum lamma khiftukum fawahaba lee rabbee hukman wajaAAalanee mina almursaleena
verses.22: Watilka niAAmatun tamunnuha AAalayya an AAabbadta banee israeela
verses.24: Qala rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena
verses.27: Qala inna rasoolakumu allathee orsila ilaykum lamajnoonun
verses.28: Qala rabbu almashriqi waalmaghribi wama baynahuma in kuntum taAAqiloona
verses.29: Qala laini ittakhathta ilahan ghayree laajAAalannaka mina almasjooneena
verses.31: Qala fati bihi in kunta mina alssadiqeena
verses.32: Faalqa AAasahu faitha hiya thuAAbanun mubeenun
verses.33: WanazaAAa yadahu faitha hiya baydao lilnnathireena
verses.34: Qala lilmalai hawlahu inna hatha lasahirun AAaleemun
verses.35: Yureedu an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihi famatha tamuroona
verses.36: Qaloo arjih waakhahu waibAAath fee almadaini hashireena
verses.40: LaAAallana nattabiAAu alssaharata in kanoo humu alghalibeena
verses.41: Falamma jaa alssaharatu qaloo lifirAAawna ainna lana laajran in kunna nahnu alghalibeena
verses.42: Qala naAAam wainnakum ithan lamina almuqarrabeena
verses.43: Qala lahum moosa alqoo ma antum mulqoona
verses.44: Faalqaw hibalahum waAAisiyyahum waqaloo biAAizzati firAAawna inna lanahnu alghaliboona
verses.45: Faalqa moosa AAasahu faitha hiya talqafu ma yafikoona
verses.49: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falasawfa taAAlamoona laoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum ajmaAAeena
verses.50: Qaloo la dayra inna ila rabbina munqaliboona
verses.51: Inna natmaAAu an yaghfira lana rabbuna khatayana an kunna awwala almumineena
verses.52: Waawhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee innakum muttabaAAoona
verses.61: Falamma taraa aljamAAani qala ashabu moosa inna lamudrakoona
verses.62: Qala kalla inna maAAiya rabbee sayahdeeni
verses.63: Faawhayna ila moosa ani idrib biAAasaka albahra fainfalaqa fakana kullu firqin kaalttawdi alAAatheemi
verses.67: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.70: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma taAAbudoona
verses.71: Qaloo naAAbudu asnaman fanathallu laha AAakifeena
verses.74: Qaloo bal wajadna abaana kathalika yafAAaloona
verses.77: Fainnahum AAaduwwun lee illa rabba alAAalameena
verses.82: Waallathee atmaAAu an yaghfira lee khateeatee yawma alddeeni
verses.83: Rabbi hab lee hukman waalhiqnee bialssaliheena
verses.84: WaijAAal lee lisana sidqin fee alakhireena
verses.86: Waighfir liabee innahu kana mina alddalleena
verses.88: Yawma la yanfaAAu malun wala banoona
verses.89: Illa man ata Allaha biqalbin saleemin
verses.92: Waqeela lahum ayna ma kuntum taAAbudoona
verses.93: Min dooni Allahi hal yansuroonakum aw yantasiroona
verses.97: TaAllahi in kunna lafee dalalin mubeenin
verses.102: Falaw anna lana karratan fanakoona mina almumineena
verses.103: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.106: Ith qala lahum akhoohum noohun ala tattaqoona
verses.109: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena
verses.112: Qala wama AAilmee bima kanoo yaAAmaloona
verses.113: In hisabuhum illa AAala rabbee law tashAAuroona
verses.116: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya noohu latakoonanna mina almarjoomeena
verses.118: Faiftah baynee wabaynahum fathan wanajjinee waman maAAiya mina almumineena
verses.119: Faanjaynahu waman maAAahu fee alfulki almashhooni
verses.121: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.124: Ith qala lahum akhoohum hoodun ala tattaqoona
verses.127: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena
verses.135: Innee akhafu AAalaykum AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin
verses.136: Qaloo sawaon AAalayna awaAAathta am lam takun mina alwaAAitheena
verses.139: Fakaththaboohu faahlaknahum inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.142: Ith qala lahum akhoohum salihun ala tattaqoona
verses.145: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena
verses.152: Allatheena yufsidoona fee alardi wala yuslihoona
verses.154: Ma anta illa basharun mithluna fati biayatin in kunta mina alssadiqeena
verses.155: Qala hathihi naqatun laha shirbun walakum shirbu yawmin maAAloomin
verses.156: Wala tamassooha bisooin fayakhuthakum AAathabu yawmin AAatheemin
verses.158: Faakhathahumu alAAathabu inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.161: Ith qala lahum akhoohum lootun ala tattaqoona
verses.164: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena
verses.166: Watatharoona ma khalaqa lakum rabbukum min azwajikum bal antum qawmun AAadoona
verses.167: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya lootu latakoonanna mina almukhrajeena
verses.173: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena
verses.174: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.177: Ith qala lahum shuAAaybun ala tattaqoona
verses.180: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena
verses.181: Awfoo alkayla wala takoonoo mina almukhsireena
verses.183: Wala tabkhasoo alnnasa ashyaahum wala taAAthaw fee alardi mufsideena
verses.186: Wama anta illa basharun mithluna wain nathunnuka lamina alkathibeena
verses.187: Faasqit AAalayna kisafan mina alssamai in kunta mina alssadiqeena
verses.189: Fakaththaboohu faakhathahum AAathabu yawmi alththullati innahu kana AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin
verses.190: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena
verses.197: Awalam yakun lahum ayatan an yaAAlamahu AAulamao banee israeela
verses.199: Faqaraahu AAalayhim ma kanoo bihi mumineena
verses.201: La yuminoona bihi hatta yarawoo alAAathaba alaleema
verses.207: Ma aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yumattaAAoona
verses.208: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa laha munthiroona
verses.213: Fala tadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fatakoona mina almuAAaththabeena
verses.215: Waikhfid janahaka limani ittabaAAaka mina almumineena
verses.216: Fain AAasawka faqul innee bareeon mimma taAAmaloona
verses.221: Hal onabbiokum AAala man tanazzalu alshshayateenu
verses.225: Alam tara annahum fee kulli wadin yaheemoona
verses.227: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati wathakaroo Allaha katheeran waintasaroo min baAAdi ma thulimoo wasayaAAlamu allatheena thalamoo ayya munqalabin yanqaliboona
